games.headline: Miami 4, Washington 1 — Meyer (W)
games.summary: Max Meyer pitched 7.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 7 strikeouts, leading Miami past Washington 4-1 at Nationals Park. Clayton Beeter lasted 1.1 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 3 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Miami: E.Ruiz homered; X.Edwards went 2-for-5; J.Mack went 2-for-3 with 2 RBI. Pete Fairbanks closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Detroit 7, Tampa Bay 2 — Melton (W)
games.summary: Troy Melton pitched 8.0 innings, allowing 2 earned runs with 5 strikeouts, leading Detroit past Tampa Bay 7-2 at Tropicana Field. Nick Martinez lasted 4.0 innings, giving up 6 earned runs, 1 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Detroit: D.Dingler homered with 4 RBI; J.Rogers homered; G.Torres went 3-for-5, including 1 double. C.Mullins went deep for Tampa Bay.

games.headline: St. Louis 5, Texas 3 — Pallante (W)
games.summary: Andre Pallante pitched 5.2 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 5 strikeouts, leading St. Louis past Texas 5-3 at Busch Stadium. MacKenzie Gore lasted 4.2 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 5 strikeouts, 3 walks. Offensively for St. Louis: J.Walker went 3-for-4; N.Velázquez went 2-for-3, including 1 double with 1 RBI. Riley O'Brien closed it out for the save.

games.headline: New York 7, Seattle 1
games.summary: Freddy Peralta pitched 6.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 6 strikeouts, leading New York past Seattle 7-1 at T-Mobile Park. George Kirby lasted 4.0 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 5 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for New York: B.Bichette went 4-for-4 with 3 RBI; J.Young went 2-for-5, including 1 double with 1 RBI. J.Crawford went deep for Seattle.

games.headline: Philadelphia 3, San Diego 2 — Sánchez (W)
games.summary: Cristopher Sánchez pitched 7.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 8 strikeouts, leading Philadelphia past San Diego 3-2 at Citizens Bank Park. Jason Adam lasted 0.2 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 2 strikeouts. Offensively for Philadelphia: K.Schwarber homered; J.Realmuto homered; B.Marsh went 2-for-4. Jhoan Duran closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Cleveland 5, New York 4 — Williams (W)
games.summary: Gavin Williams pitched 5.1 innings, allowing 3 earned runs with 6 strikeouts, leading Cleveland past New York 5-4 at Yankee Stadium. Gerrit Cole lasted 5.1 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 2 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Cleveland: J.Ramírez homered; K.Manzardo homered; R.Hoskins homered with 3 RBI. J.Jr., J.Caballero went deep for New York. Cade Smith closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Chicago Blank Minnesota, 8-0
games.summary: Erick Fedde pitched 5.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 2 strikeouts, leading Chicago past Minnesota 8-0 at Target Field. Taj Bradley lasted 4.2 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 5 strikeouts, 5 walks. Offensively for Chicago: A.Benintendi homered with 2 RBI; S.Antonacci went 4-for-4, including 2 doubles with 1 RBI; J.Gonzalez went 2-for-4 with 2 RBI. Minnesota was held scoreless.

games.headline: San Francisco Blank Milwaukee, 1-0
games.summary: Logan Webb pitched 7.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 4 strikeouts, leading San Francisco past Milwaukee 1-0 at American Family Field. Robert Gasser lasted 5.0 innings, giving up 1 earned runs, 5 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for San Francisco: V.Bericoto homered; J.Lee went 2-for-4; D.Susac went 2-for-4. Keaton Winn closed it out for the save. Milwaukee was held scoreless.

games.headline: Los Angeles 11, Colorado 4
games.summary: Walbert Ureña pitched 6.0 innings, allowing 3 earned runs with 7 strikeouts, leading Los Angeles past Colorado 11-4 at Angel Stadium. Michael Lorenzen lasted 3.1 innings, giving up 8 earned runs, 5 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Los Angeles: V.Grissom homered with 3 RBI; W.Meckler went 4-for-5, including 1 double; O.Peraza went 2-for-5, including 1 double with 2 RBI. T.Freeman went deep for Colorado.

games.headline: Houston 11, Pittsburgh 9 — Blubaugh (W)
games.summary: AJ Blubaugh pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 2 strikeouts, leading Houston past Pittsburgh 11-9 at Daikin Park. Josh Hader closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Kansas City 5, Cincinnati 2 — IV (W)

B.Dunn went deep for Cincinnati. Alex Lange closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Athletics 5, Chicago 4 (F/10)
games.summary: Hogan Harris pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 2 strikeouts, leading Athletics past Chicago 5-4 at Wrigley Field. Ethan Roberts lasted 0.2 innings, giving up 0 earned runs. Offensively for Athletics: C.Thomas homered; T.Soderstrom went 2-for-5 with 2 RBI. P.Crow-Armstrong, S.Suzuki went deep for Chicago. Justin Sterner closed it out for the save. The teams needed 10 innings to decide it.

games.headline: Boston 8, Baltimore 1

games.headline: Los Angeles Blank Arizona, 7-0
games.summary: Shohei Ohtani pitched 6.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 6 strikeouts, leading Los Angeles past Arizona 7-0 at Chase Field. Zac Gallen lasted 5.0 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 1 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Los Angeles: K.Tucker homered with 2 RBI; S.Ohtani went 3-for-4; F.Freeman went 2-for-6 with 2 RBI.
